ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] certimate-go/certimate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/certimate-go/certimate
Language: go
An open-source and free self-hosted SSL certificates ACME tool, automates the full-cycle of issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring visually. 完全开源免费的自托管 SSL 证书 ACME 工具，申请、部署、续期、监控全流程自动化可视化，支持各大主流云厂商。

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/perses/perses
Language: go
The CNCF sandbox for observability visualisation. Already supports Prometheus, Tempo, Loki and Pyroscope - more data sources to come!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [mlir] NVIDIA/cuda-tile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-tile
Language: mlir
CUDA Tile IR is an MLIR-based intermediate representation and compiler infrastructure for CUDA kernel optimization, focusing on tile-based computation patterns and optimizations targeting NVIDIA tensor core units.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
Language: typescript
A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)

screenpipe turns your computer into a personal AI that knows everything you've done. record. search. automate. all local, all private, all yours.
